tasks.subject: Task 1: Vendor DropdownMenu primitive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ui/dropdown-menu/ Reka wrappers so NavUser can use the shadcn account-menu pattern.

**Files:** Create dashboard/src/components/ui/dropdown-menu/{DropdownMenu,DropdownMenuTrigger,DropdownMenuContent,DropdownMenuItem,DropdownMenuLabel,DropdownMenuSeparator,DropdownMenuGroup}.vue + index.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/ui/dropdown-menu/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["seven wrappers + barrel compile","vue-tsc -b 0 errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: UserAvatar component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reusable initials avatar (displayName → username → generic icon). TDD.

**Files:** Create dashboard/src/components/custom/UserAvatar.vue + UserAvatar.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/UserAvatar.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/UserAvatar.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/UserAvatar.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["two-word→AS","one-word→AL","blank→username initials","both empty→icon, no text"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: EditDisplayNameDialog + accountMenu i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dialog editing displayName via PUT /me, mirroring server validation, inline error. Add accountMenu i18n keys. TDD.

**Files:** Create dashboard/src/components/custom/EditDisplayNameDialog.vue + .test.ts; Modify dashboard/src/locales/en.ts (add accountMenu, additive). Grep apostrophes after edit.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/EditDisplayNameDialog.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/EditDisplayNameDialog.test.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/EditDisplayNameDialog.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["prefills current name","Save disabled unchanged/empty/>128","Save PUT /me + patch store from response + close","invalid_display_name keeps open + mapped msg + preserves input"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: NavUser sidebar account control
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Footer dropdown: identity header, Edit (opens dialog on nextTick), Sign out (→/logout); skeleton while loading; sibling edit dialog. defineExpose({openEdit,signOut,editOpen}). TDD.

**Files:** Create dashboard/src/components/custom/NavUser.vue + .test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/NavUser.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/NavUser.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/NavUser.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["skeleton when me null; trigger w/ name+role+initials when loaded","signOut→/logout","openEdit opens dialog after nextTick"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire AppSidebar to NavUser; drop Profile nav item
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Footer → <NavUser/>; remove Profile nav link + unused User/LogOut imports; remove nav.profile; update AppSidebar.test.

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue + AppSidebar.test.ts + dashboard/src/locales/en.ts. Grep apostrophes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.test.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/AppSidebar.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["no / Profile link; Security first","footer renders NavUser trigger; no /logout anchor","AppSidebar.test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Default to /security; remove Profile page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Redirect / → security; delete ProfileView + test; prune profile i18n block.

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/router/index.ts + dashboard/src/locales/en.ts; Delete dashboard/src/pages/ProfileView.vue + ProfileView.test.ts. Grep apostrophes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/router/index.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/pages/ProfileView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/ProfileView.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vue-tsc -b && npx vitest run","acceptanceCriteria":["/ redirects to security route; no ProfileView refs","profile i18n block removed; vue-tsc -b 0 errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Done-gate — verify, rebuild + commit dist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full FE+Go+smoke green, rebuild embedded SPA, live-verify click-paths, commit dist.

**Files:** pkg/webui/dist/** (regenerated by vite build)

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test && npm run build && cd .. && go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["vitest green; vue-tsc -b 0","go build/vet/test 0","SMOKE_EXIT=0","dist rebuilt+committed","live: dropdown/edit/signout/'/'→security work"]}
```
